items: Fixed issue with Edge Panning annoyingly moving the camera after you pressed a button near the edge
Temple progress bar is now visually split in four
Increased building description font size a bit
Farm max yield at 32 farms, down from 36
Can no longer edge-pan the camera while in the victory screen or during initial popup.
Added notifications back in, but simplified
Fixed exp orb flying to corner not visible
Edge Panning is now prevented when the cursor is over UI buttons
Updated the How To Play information
Game start with a How To Play window (Placeholder for the real Onboarding)
Updated buildings thumbnails and descriptions
Senders no longer destroy trees as they move
When settlement fails to generate gold it slows down for a few cycles
Fixed a pathing bug affecting senders when production and settlement were too close
Added Camera Edge Panning
Added Edge Pan and Bloom settings
Various cloud clearance radius tweaks
Additional resource balance tweaks
Additional Art and UI tweaks
Removed notifications widget for now.
New experience system that replaces Civ Points
Building things now grants experience
Start area is now automatically selected
Only start area is clear of clouds
New Waypost building that is used to clear clouds
Forestlodge placement distances now similar to Woodcamp
Added Raining and Snowing weather states
Added per buildings prerequisite conditions
Re-ordered Buildings list so Woodcamp is first
Large balance pass
Many art tweaks
Added Changelog
Added Gold production timer to settlement
Added Camera Zoom Control
Added Material cost to Buildings
Added Food cost to Senders
Renamed Hunterslodge to Forestlodge
Start of Playtest
